items.summary: Extend the backend to support advertisement management: add an Advertisement data type with fields for id, title, imageUrl, linkUrl, placement (enum: #jobBoard, #jobDetail, #seekerDashboard, #posterDashboard, #landing), isActive (bool), createdAt, and expiresAt (optional). Implement admin-only CRUD functions: createAd, updateAd, deleteAd, toggleAdActive, and a public getAdsByPlacement query that returns active ads for a given placement.
Add TanStack Query hooks in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts for advertisement operations: useGetAdsByPlacement(placement), useCreateAd, useUpdateAd, useDeleteAd, and useToggleAdActive mutations.

Create a reusable AdBanner component at frontend/src/components/AdBanner.tsx that accepts a placement prop, fetches active ads for that placement via useGetAdsByPlacement, and renders a dismissible banner card with the ad image, title, and an external link. Show nothing if no active ads exist for the placement. Include a subtle 'Advertisement' label for transparency.

Integrate the AdBanner component into appropriate areas of the app: place one instance in frontend/src/pages/JobBoard.tsx (above or between the job listing grid), one in frontend/src/pages/JobDetailPage.tsx (below the job details section), one in frontend/src/components/LandingPage.tsx (below the hero section), one in frontend/src/pages/SeekerDashboard.tsx (at the top of the main content area), and one in frontend/src/pages/PosterDashboard.tsx (at the top of the main content area). Each instance must pass the corresponding placement value.

Add an 'Advertisements' management tab to the existing AdminDashboard page (frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx). This tab should display a table of all advertisements (title, placement, active status, expiry, link) with actions to toggle active/inactive and delete each ad. Include a 'Create New Ad' button that opens a modal/form where the admin can enter title, image URL, link URL, placement (dropdown), and optional expiry date. Show a success or error toast notification after each action.
